_comment: Project-shared Claude Code settings. Personal/local overrides go in settings.local.json (gitignored). Replace the example permissions below with the tools your project actually uses; keep the deny list as a safety floor.

permissions._allow_comment: Covers what /wrapup (commit/branch/merge) and /bootstrap (uv, pytest, ruff) actually run. Deliberately absent: git checkout (can discard work) and git push (landing is an explicit user ask — see the memory skill).
permissions._deny_comment: The safety floor — secrets never enter the transcript. .env.example is deliberately NOT denied (it ships empty values and the skills read it for the expected keys); validate-bash.sh blocks shell reads of every other .env file. Full threat model: .claude/memory/policy/security.md.

_skillOverrides_comment: Gated-skill on/off profile. `/intake` writes this — TOOL skills flip by stack choice, LANE skills flip by project archetype (tabular, timeseries, LLM, monitoring-at-deploy). Chassis + CV workflow skills are always on and are NOT listed here.
